verses.text: “Mi khat' biakna pen thunuama biakna ahih a, amah in a nu hita leh a pa hita leh bawnghon lak panin a piak leh, amah in Topa' mai-ah a sitbaanglo pia ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go ding a, tua ciangin Aaron' suan siampite in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi
Thunuama biakna panin Topa' tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a thaute leh a sungkuate' tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh
a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau leh a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Aaron' suante in mei tunga om sing tunga meihal biakpiakna tau tung mahah hal ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi
“ Topa' tungah thunuama a piak ding ama biakna pen tuu leh keel honte sung panin a nu hita leh a pa hita leh ganhing khat ahih leh, amah in a sitbaanglo pia ding hi
Amah in biakna dingin tuuno khat a piak leh, Topa' mai-ah pia ding a
a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron' suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi
Tua ciangin thunuama biakna panin Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in a thau, a nungguh ciangah a ki-attan a mei thau buppi leh a gilpi tuam a thaute leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi
“Ama biakna keel ahih leh, amah in Topa' mai-ah pia ding a
a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron' suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa-a' ahi hi
Tua pen na khang tawntungun na ten'na khempeuh uhah note in a thau leh sisan na neklohna dingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
